message:
security: fix authorization bypass and improve XSS protection

Critical fixes from deep code review:

1. Author response endpoint (respond/route.ts):
   - Removed trusting of client x-content-author-id header (spoofable)
   - Disabled author responses in production until proper content
     ownership verification is implemented
   - Added security documentation for future implementation

2. XSS sanitization (review-store.ts):
   - Replaced basic <> stripping with comprehensive sanitization
   - Now removes script/style tags with content
   - Removes javascript: and data: URLs
   - Removes event handlers (onclick, onerror, etc.)
   - Properly HTML-encodes special characters

3. Error handling (use-reviews.ts):
   - Fixed potential crash when server returns non-JSON error
   - Added try/catch around res.json() for error responses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
